name: skylence
description: Skylence .sky workflow authoring and operation: 5 slash commands (incl. /lsp install <language>), 12 skills (incl. the judge-design chain, judge-setup, and skyline-setup), 6 bundled MCP servers (stdio + HTTP), 13 LSP servers (skyway lsp stdio plus the official Claude Code language servers), a judge PreToolUse hook (opt-in via ~/.claude/judge-rules.json), and a SessionStart skyline-tools steer. The skyway binary is optional — servers for missing binaries simply don't start.
